---
title: "Presentation Test 2"
subtitle: "A Tale of a Pretty Thesis"
author: "Radu Diaconescu"
format: 
    revealjs: 
        theme: [serif, custom.scss]
        toc: true
jupyter: max_entropy_radu_conda
---

## First content slide

What a slide!

## Second content slide

$\frac{dp}{dt} = a + b$

## This guy can even do plots!

![](images/regions_2019_scatter.png){fig-align="center"}

## The python one!

```{python}
#| code-line-numbers: "|6|9"

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

r = np.arange(0, 2, 0.01)
theta = 12 * np.pi * r
fig, ax = plt.subplots(subplot_kw={'projection': 'polar'})
ax.plot(theta, r)
ax.set_rticks([0.5, 1, 1.5, 2])
ax.grid(True)
plt.show()
```

## Plotly

```{python}
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.io as pio
gapminder = px.data.gapminder()
gapminder2007 = gapminder.query("year == 2007")
fig = px.scatter(gapminder2007, 
                 x="gdpPercap", y="lifeExp", color="continent", 
                 size="pop", size_max=60,
                 hover_name="country")
fig.show()
```

## Matplotlib fancy

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| code-line-numbers: "|6|9"

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

r = np.arange(0, 2, 0.01)
theta = 2 * np.pi * r
fig, ax = plt.subplots(subplot_kw={'projection': 'polar'})
ax.plot(theta, r)
ax.set_rticks([0.5, 1, 1.5, 2])
ax.grid(True)
plt.show()
```


## Network visualization
```{python}
import json
import html
import numpy as np
import networkx as nx
from IPython.display import HTML, display

# --- Network definition: (source, target, flow weight) ---
edges = [("A", "B", 5), ("A", "C", 2), ("B", "D", 4),
         ("C", "D", 1), ("B", "C", 3),
         ("D", "E", 2), ("E", "F", 3), ("F", "A", 1)]
G = nx.DiGraph()
G.add_weighted_edges_from(edges)
pos = nx.spring_layout(G, seed=42, k=2, iterations=50)

# --- Normalise node coordinates to [0, 1] ---
xs = np.array([pos[n][0] for n in G.nodes()])
ys = np.array([pos[n][1] for n in G.nodes()])
x_min, x_max, y_min, y_max = xs.min(), xs.max(), ys.min(), ys.max()

def norm(v, lo, hi):
    return 0.5 if hi == lo else (v - lo) / (hi - lo)

nodes = [{"label": str(n),
          "x": float(norm(pos[n][0], x_min, x_max)),
          "y": float(norm(pos[n][1], y_min, y_max))}
         for n in G.nodes()]

edge_list = [{"x0": float(norm(pos[u][0], x_min, x_max)),
              "y0": float(norm(pos[u][1], y_min, y_max)),
              "x1": float(norm(pos[v][0], x_min, x_max)),
              "y1": float(norm(pos[v][1], y_min, y_max)),
              "w": int(w)}
             for u, v, w in edges]

data_json = json.dumps({"nodes": nodes, "edges": edge_list})

# --- Self-contained animated canvas, isolated inside an iframe ---
inner = """<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head><meta charset="utf-8">
<style>
  html, body { margin: 0; padding: 0; background: transparent; }
  canvas { display: block; background: transparent; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="c"></canvas>
<script>
const DATA = __DATA__;
const W = 700, H = 500, PAD = 60;
const SPEED = 0.25;          // edge traversals per second
const DOT_R = 5, NODE_R = 14;
const dpr = window.devicePixelRatio || 1;
const cv = document.getElementById('c');
cv.style.width = W + 'px';
cv.style.height = H + 'px';
cv.width = W * dpr;
cv.height = H * dpr;
const ctx = cv.getContext('2d');
ctx.scale(dpr, dpr);
function px(x){ return PAD + x * (W - 2*PAD); }
function py(y){ return H - (PAD + y * (H - 2*PAD)); }
function frame(now){
  const t = now / 1000;
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);
  ctx.strokeStyle = '#d0d0d0';
  ctx.lineWidth = 2;
  for (const e of DATA.edges){
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(px(e.x0), py(e.y0));
    ctx.lineTo(px(e.x1), py(e.y1));
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  ctx.fillStyle = '#e63946';
  for (const e of DATA.edges){
    const n = e.w;
    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++){
      const phase = i / n;
      const f = (t * SPEED + phase) % 1;
      const x = px(e.x0 + f * (e.x1 - e.x0));
      const y = py(e.y0 + f * (e.y1 - e.y0));
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(x, y, DOT_R, 0, 2*Math.PI);
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }
  for (const nd of DATA.nodes){
    const x = px(nd.x), y = py(nd.y);
    ctx.fillStyle = '#222831';
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(x, y, NODE_R, 0, 2*Math.PI);
    ctx.fill();
    ctx.font = '16px sans-serif';
    ctx.textAlign = 'center';
    ctx.fillText(nd.label, x, y - NODE_R - 6);
  }
  requestAnimationFrame(frame);
}
requestAnimationFrame(frame);
</script>
</body>
</html>"""

inner = inner.replace("__DATA__", data_json)
iframe = ('<iframe style="width:700px;height:500px;border:none;background:transparent;" '
          'srcdoc="' + html.escape(inner, quote=True) + '"></iframe>')
display(HTML(iframe))
```
